programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama. Vera is called out to the scene of a body found in the back of a burned-out car - when it's identified as a popular local GP, a world of intrigue opens up.

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.desc: The dead body of a woman who has been missing for over 35 years leads the pair to uncover the dark heart of one of Bath's richest families.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a university friend of Hobson - as more deaths occur, they realise that Laura's past may hold the key.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector's mother comes to stay at Mum's, but the two women do not get on.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Never the Twain
programme.desc: Classic British sitcom. When Ringo wins a holiday in Spain, Simon and Oliver are soon vying to accompany him.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus company. Two women compete for the inspector's affections.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jonny and Paul argue about the situation between Katie, Gray and Perdy. Chas warns Gennie about turning into a layabout, and Sam offers to help Jo out on the farm for free.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Brenda catches Gennie in the hot tub with Eli and accuses the Dingles of corrupting her daughter. Diane comforts Gray, and Paul begs Jonny not to give up on their relationship.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The residents are terrorised by a gang of yobs who run riot on the Street, and Sally is peeved when she sees Claire showing two prospective buyers round her house.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: News of the break-in quickly spreads, prompting the couple who had their sights set on Claire's home to pull out of the deal, and Tina's dad Joe (Reece Dinsdale) pays a visit.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A reunion at Oxford's last all-female college ends in tragedy when one of the alumnae is killed - is it connected to an attack there ten years before.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick discovers the suspicious past of a man who arrives in Aidensfield apparently suffering from amnesia.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the 1960s. A local woman's attempts to avoid her husband's advances by putting sleeping tablets in his whisky have tragic consequences.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby uncovers a decades-old battle of the sexes when an ageing feminist and a misogynist vicar are murdered, but whose side is the killer on.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Gennie mans the phones at the vets but her good intentions with an injured animal lead to her being arrested for theft. Sam comforts Jo when a sheep she has injured dies.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Sam's feelings for Jo and tries to warn him off. Lexi asks Jimmy to help her get back with Carl, and David searches Rodney's house for his manuscript.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris decides to install CCTV after the break-in, and Jerry pays the price for his heroics as he gives chase to Kenzie and his gang when they pay a return visit to Roy.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. Nick is confronted by a Russian sailor demanding political asylum, and Greengrass teams up with an unusual partner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire in the 1960s. The discovery of wartime ammunition leads to problems when it falls into the hands of some local children.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Martin fears that Louisa is in danger when he links a woman's collapse at Portwenn's Harbour Day celebrations to a taxi driver's migraines.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Martin struggles to come to terms with fatherhood, has doubts about Portwenn's new GP, and receives a devastating personal blow.

programme.title: McDonald and Dodds
programme.desc: When a body is found on a bus during a morning rush hour in Bath, the duo are sucked into a mystery involving a precious artefact.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A reunion at Oxford's last all-female college ends in tragedy when one of the alumnae is killed - is it connected to an attack there ten years before.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus company. Two women compete for the inspector's affections.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe investigates the killing of a policeman, but the chief suspect is another officer who was having an affair with the dead man's wife.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Lane investigates two drug dealers' deaths and defends Wycliffe against corruption allegations after a woman from his past appears demanding help.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama. When Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a rising Oxford theatre star, they soon focus their suspicions on his acting colleagues.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When the master of a college is found dead at the foot of its observatory's stairs, suspicion falls on all of the staff from senior tutors right down to its scouts.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A murder is announced in the personal columns of a local paper, but is it just a game? Miss Marple visits and sets about uncovering the village's dark secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two weddings are due to take place - Cully's to Simon, and that of local baronet Ned Fitzroy - when the maid of honour at Fitzroy's nuptials is found murdered.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Sonia Woodley is stabbed in the churchyard, Barnaby and Jones investigate and the feudal village of Milton Cross starts to reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, country magazine Midsomer Life and its outspoken owner Guy Sandys come under scrutiny from Barnaby and Jones.
